place: Lamai, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Warm Three-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa in Lamai
blurb: A warm, welcoming three-bedroom pool villa in a quiet Lamai residence, finished in natural wood and marble with a private pool and a mountain backdrop. Single-storey living, three en-suite bedrooms and a bright open kitchen. ฿9,900,000.
detail:
Set in a small residential community in the Lamai hills, this single-storey villa has a warmer, more textured palette than most — natural timber, marble and soft neutral tones around a private pool with a mountain view. It sits on 472 m² of land with 324 m² of built space, close to Lamai's beach, restaurants and amenities.

The open living level centres on a marble kitchen with a central island, flowing into living and dining areas that open to the pool terrace. Three double bedrooms each have an en-suite bathroom and their own outlook, with air-conditioning throughout and the villa delivered fully furnished.

The pool is framed by a sun terrace, lawn and mature planting. The villa is held on a registered leasehold running from February 2020 to February 2050 — a 30-year term. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory on request.
